description: Calculate theoretical compensation payouts for airline delays and summarize the financial liability in WPS Spreadsheet using the data in /home/ga/Documents/flight_data.xlsx. In the 'Flights' sheet, classify each flight in a 'Status' column (Column J) as "Cancelled" if CANCELLED (Column I) is 1, "Severely Delayed" if ARRIVAL_DELAY (Column H) is 120 or more, or "Normal" otherwise. Calculate 'Payout' amounts in Column K: 600 for "Cancelled" status; 250 for "Severely Delayed" with DISTANCE (Column F) under 1000; 500 for "Severely Delayed" with DISTANCE of 1000 or more; and 0 for all other cases. Create a new sheet named 'Liability Summary' with a table starting at A1 including headers 'Airline', 'Total Flights', 'Severely Delayed', 'Total Payout', and 'Avg Payout Per Flight'. Populate this table for airlines AA, DL, UA, WN, and B6 using the data from the 'Flights' sheet. Format the 'Total Payout' and 'Avg Payout Per Flight' columns as Currency ($) and save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/flight_data.xlsx.
